name: arsenale
description: Web-based remote desktop manager for SSH and RDP connections with encrypted vault, team sharing, and multi-tenant support
author: Daniele Viti <daniele@dnviti.dev>

scripts.predev: $(./scripts/container-runtime.sh) compose -f compose.dev.yml up -d postgres && npm run db:generate
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client:wait"
scripts.dev:client:wait: wait-on -t 60000 http-get://localhost:3001/api/health && npm run dev -w client
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w gateways/tunnel-agent && npm run build -w browser-extensions
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w gateways/tunnel-agent && npm run typecheck -w browser-extensions
scripts.test:watch: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && npx vitest" "cd client && npx vitest"
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run sast && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client && npm run test -w gateways/tunnel-agent && npm run build
